channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-19T01:08Z — 1639 outages, 122,318 customers, 243 fair-weather, 14 DC-proximate
item.description: VA-DOM: 9345 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | VA-DOM: 5036 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | BGE: 3216 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VA-DOM: 2503 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | BGE: 2169 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)
